content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of an operating system?",
      "options": ["A) To store and retrieve data", "B) To manage computer hardware components", "C) To manage data storage and retrieval, as well as control the system's hardware resources", "D) To run applications"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "The primary function of an operating system is to manage data storage and retrieval, as well as control the system's hardware resources."
